title: Project Overview
description: Start with the README and package.json to understand that this is a Svelte 5 + Vite + TypeScript damage calculator for the Voxel Blade RPG. Note the key dependencies and scripts.

title: Entry Point & App Shell
description: See how the app boots: main.ts mounts App.svelte, which sets up global styles (app.css) and renders the DamageAnalyzer as the main view.

title: Type System & Data Models
description: Understand the foundational TypeScript types — StatKey, Race, Guild, Armor, WeaponBlade, Enchantment, BuildState, and damage result types that flow through the entire engine.

title: Game Engine Core
description: The engine layer wires together weapon computation, enchantment application, shrine boosts, defense resolution, crit calculation, and damage type resolution. Start with engine.ts and explore the sub-modules.

title: Game Data Definitions
description: All game content lives in src/data: perk damage tables, rune definitions, heal boosts, DoT damage, draconic buffs, stat boosts, weapon arts, race effects, summon data, and more.

title: Damage Analyzer — The Main Orchestrator
description: DamageAnalyzer.svelte is the heart of the UI. It pulls together all engine calculations, defense resolution, and renders the full damage breakdown. This is where data meets presentation.

title: UI Components & Modals
description: Reusable UI primitives (Badge, Button, Card, Panel, Stat, Section) in src/lib/ui, plus specialized components like EnchantSelect, WeaponStatsDisplay, BuffList, and modal dialogs for Race, Guild, and Weapon selection.

title: Constants, Config & Build
description: Game balance tuning lives in src/lib/constants (boosts, defense, damage types, draconic, CDR, DoT, stat conversions). The project builds with Vite and deploys to Vercel.
